title: fragaria viridis var. umbelliformis
intro: Fragaria viridis var. umbelliformis is a lesser-known, edible, and medicinal variant of the green strawberry plant, characterized by its unique, umbelliform inflorescence and green fruit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Fragaria viridis var. umbelliformis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a sought-after ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in culinary applications, such as jams and preserves, to add flavor and nutritional value.
